overview.description: MDS Foundations provides foundational CSS classes for layout, typography, and more.

usage.description: Import the whole foundations.cSS file to use all CSS classes across your project, or import specific files as needed.

examples.basic:
Name Last port Built (year) Length (m) Capacity (TEU)
Madrid Maersk Shanghai 2017 399 19,630
Mary Maersk Busan 2013 399 18,270

api.description: Foundational classes for styling HTML tables. Use it if you use native HTML table elements like `<table>`, or using external libraries like Tanstack Table or AG Grid and you make your own customizations. We recommend using the `mc-table` component for better accessibility and styling control, with multiple features working out of the box and option to high customization.

classes.name: mds-table
classes.usage: Use mds-table class to style HTML tables with consistent design and behavior.

classes.name: mds-table__subtext
classes.usage: Use mds-table__subtext class to style subtext within table cells.

classes.name: mds-table--large
classes.usage: Use mds-table--large class to style tables that are displayed in a more spacious format.

classes.name: mds-table--small
classes.usage: Use mds-table--small class to style tables that are displayed in a more compact format.

classes.name: mds-table--zebra-stripes
classes.usage: Use mds-table--zebra-stripes class to style tables with alternating row colors.

classes.name: mds-table--zebra-stripes-with-expand
classes.usage: Use row pairs (main row + expanded row) for zebra striping.

classes.name: mds-table--horizontal-lines-dashed
classes.usage: Use mds-table--horizontal-lines-dashed class to style tables with dashed horizontal lines.

classes.name: mds-table--horizontal-lines-dotted
classes.usage: Use mds-table--horizontal-lines-dotted class to style tables with dotted horizontal lines.

classes.name: mds-table--vertical-lines-solid
classes.usage: Use mds-table--vertical-lines-solid class to style tables with solid vertical lines.

classes.name: mds-table--vertical-lines-dashed
classes.usage: Use mds-table--vertical-lines-dashed class to style tables with dashed vertical lines.

classes.name: mds-table--vertical-lines-dotted
classes.usage: Use mds-table--vertical-lines-dotted class to style tables with dotted vertical lines.

classes.name: mds-table--horizontal-lines-none
classes.usage: Use mds-table--horizontal-lines-none class to style tables with no horizontal lines.

classes.name: mds-table--vertical-lines-none
classes.usage: Use mds-table--vertical-lines-none class to style tables with no vertical lines.

classes.name: mds-table--outer-border-none
classes.usage: Use mds-table--outer-border-none class to style tables with no outer border.

classes.name: mds-table--outer-border-dashed
classes.usage: Use mds-table--outer-border-dashed class to style tables with a dashed outer border.

classes.name: mds-table--outer-border-dotted
classes.usage: Use mds-table--outer-border-dotted class to style tables with a dotted outer border.

classes.name: mds-table--outer-border-corners-square
classes.usage: Use mds-table--outer-border-corners-square class to style tables with square outer border corners.

classes.name: mds-table--nowrap
classes.usage: Use mds-table--nowrap class to prevent text wrapping in table cells.

classes.name: mds-table__cell--nowrap
classes.example: This cell will not wrap text
classes.usage: Use mds-table__cell--nowrap class to prevent text wrapping in specific table cells.

classes.name: mds-table--vertical-align-top
classes.usage: Use mds-table--vertical-align-top class to align table cell content to the top.

classes.name: mds-table--vertical-align-baseline
classes.usage: Use mds-table--vertical-align-baseline class to align table cell content to the baseline.

classes.name: mds-table--vertical-align-bottom
classes.usage: Use mds-table--vertical-align-bottom class to align table cell content to the bottom.

classes.name: mds-table__column--row-selector
classes.usage: Use mds-table__column--row-selector class to add a column for row selection checkboxes.

classes.name: mds_table__row--selected
classes.usage: Use mds_table__row--selected class to style selected rows in a table.

classes.name: mds-table__column--row-expander
classes.usage: Use mds-table__column--row-expander class to add a column for row expander buttons.

classes.name: mds-table__header-cell--sortable
classes.usage: Use mds-table__header-cell--sortable class to make table headers sortable.

classes.name: mds-table--scrollable
classes.usage: Use mds-table--scrollable class to make the table scrollable when it exceeds the available space.

classes.name: mds-table--header-sticky-viewport
classes.usage: Use mds-table--header-sticky-viewport class when the sticky header should attach to the viewport rather than an inner scroll container.

classes.name: mds-table--header-none
classes.usage: Use mds-table--header-none class to hide the table header.

classes.name: mds-table--footer
classes.usage: Use mds-table--footer class to add a footer to the table.

classes.name: mds-table__column--sticky
classes.usage: Use mds-table__column--sticky class to make a column sticky.

classes.name: mds-table--header-sticky
classes.usage: Use mds-table--header-sticky class to make the table header sticky.

classes.name: mds-table--footer-sticky
classes.usage: Use mds-table--footer-sticky class to make the table footer sticky.

classes.name: mds-table__cell--text-center
classes.usage: Use mds-table__cell--text-center class to center-align text in table cells.

classes.name: mds-table__cell--text-right
classes.usage: Use mds-table__cell--text-right class to right-align text in table cells.

classes.name: mds-table__cell--tabular-figures
classes.usage: Use mds-table__cell--tabular-figures class to apply tabular figures font feature to table cells.

classes.name: mds-table__cell--number
classes.usage: Use mds-table__cell--number class to style table cells containing numbers.

classes.name: mds-table__cell--content-top
classes.usage: Use mds-table__cell--content-top class to align content to the top of table cells.

classes.name: mds-table__cell--content-center
classes.usage: Use mds-table__cell--content-center class to center-align content vertically in table cells.

classes.name: mds-table__cell--content-bottom
classes.usage: Use mds-table__cell--content-bottom class to align content to the bottom of table cells.

classes.name: mds-table__expanded-row
classes.example: Expanded content here Expanded content here
classes.usage: Use mds-table__expanded-row class to style expanded rows in a table.

classes.name: mds-table--medium
classes.usage: Use mds-table--medium class to style tables with medium size.

classes.name: mds-table__expanded-row__trigger
classes.usage: Use mds-table__expanded-row__trigger class to style the trigger for expanded rows.

classes.name: mds-table-and-caption
classes.usage: Use mds-table-and-caption class to style a table with a caption.

classes.name: mds-table-caption
classes.usage: Use mds-table-caption class to style the caption of a table.

classes.name: mds-table-caption--small
classes.usage: Use mds-table-caption--small class to style small captions for tables.

classes.name: mds-table-caption--large
classes.usage: Use mds-table-caption--large class to style large captions for tables.
